pr.title: Record: 11L Next-Gen Stack + Custom Kernels, val_bpb=1.1399

output.summary: 11-layer transformer bundles XSA, partial NTK-RoPE, Muon+SWA training, int5+zstd compression, and custom Triton kernels for a compact Next-Gen Stack.
techniques: XSA with partial NTK-aware RoPE and depth-aware LN scaling
Int5 quantization plus GPTQ-lite search layered with zstd-22 compression
Muon optimizer with μP scaling and SWA tail averaging
